name: dwarf2json

commands.name: dwarf2json
commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# dwarf2json -h
 Usage: dwarf2json COMMAND
 
 A tool for generating intermediate symbol file (ISF)
 
 Commands:
 linux  generate ISF for Linux analysis
 mac    generate ISF for macOS analysis

binary_metadata.file_type: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (SYSV), dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, Go BuildID=Do6HlqHQ1aoZXQhQSvmC/4dCQtC12y16dlPFx_wf4/x1pvX5m7yFQFa5ortxBH/zSX4frtbM-MZwA2vcXIB, stripped

apt_metadata.description:
utility to generat volatility 3 Intermediate Symbol File (ISF) JSON
This package contains a Go utility that processes files containing symbol and
type information to generate Volatilty3 Intermediate Symbol File (ISF) JSON
output suitable for Linux and macOS analysis.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dwarf2json because ### dwarf2json.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dwarf2json COMMAND` as documented upstream for dwarf2json.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dwarf2json with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dwarf2json --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### dwarf2json.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install dwarf2json
Install with: sudo apt install dwarf2json
